---
title: "Buy a Broom"
---

## Buy a Broom

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1880
**Genre:** fiction
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** Rochester NY: Fitch

### Notes

This is am American reprint, possibly pirated.  \'Buy a Broom\' has not been identified, but  \'Kaspar\'s Summer Dream\' <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1876) 16-32, and \'Early Dew, or, the Boy Bishop\' <i>MP</i> (Christmas 1878), 6-20, were certainly by CMY.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
